mapper.sql: select session_id, ragflow_session_id, agent_code, user_id, session_title, status, last_message_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from mag_agent_session
mapper.insert: insert into mag_agent_session (session_id, ragflow_session_id, agent_code, user_id, session_title, status, last_message_time, create_by, create_time) values (#{sessionId}, #{ragflowSessionId}, #{agentCode}, #{userId}, #{sessionTitle}, #{status}, #{lastMessageTime}, #{createBy}, #{createTime})
